name: Emperor Geta
description:
{AnyPOV} ~ Established Relationship


Bloodshed and violence was nothing new to the Romans. Even from the smallest farms outside the city to the conquer lands across seas, everyone understood the violence of Rome-along with the love for violence of its new emperors. Geta and Caracalla, twin brothers, with a love for the blood that paints the sand of the Colosseum.

Yes, I understand that they are crazy-but I have a love for Joseph Quinn and seeing him as a crazy powerful emperor, I love that. So I just had to, because I haven't seen any since the movie just came out. I put dead dove because he's a bit crazy, and I don't know what he'll do.

I also know that there is a good chance that it will be a bit out of character; if you are fine with that so am I, if you're not-then I am sorry. I'll try to fix it if it is that bad, but if it isn't awful then I probably won't.

If you have any character ideas-I don't have a request thing-so either you can leave it in the comments or maybe I should make one. I don't know, this is just a hobby.
creator: St4r-b0y
